title: Is this pic an official advertisement
display_title: Is this pic an official advertisement
wikitext:
[]: Is this pic an official advertisement             Quote Post by hwdge » Wed Jan 02, 2013 3:45 pm Found this thing on google, is this a real thing, it looks a bit too absurd to be real. guess that means 01 has facial hair?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jan 02, 2013 3:47 pm I never noticed that Asuka's head is bigger than Kaji's. This means something.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 02, 2013 3:51 pm It's real, yet another bit of monetizing the franchise from last spring.

[]: Re: Is this pic an official advertisement             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2013 4:03 pm hwdge wrote: guess that means 01 has facial hair?

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Wed Jan 02, 2013 4:06 pm Is it just me, or does the object in Asuka's hand look like a vibrator? EDIT: On a less vulgar note, I think that Gendou looks just a little too happy to be shaving. Has he just discovered the existence of the razor? Furthermore, what's up with Rei? Does she have facial hair, too, or is she just helping Gendou? Either way, this opens a massive can of worms regarding either Rei's hormonal imbalance, or Gendou's immaturity regarding hygiene.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Jan 02, 2013 4:39 pm I do remember Aiko Heiwa making a hilarious photoshop featuring Gendou and Rei from this picture. She even wore it as an avatar for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jan 02, 2013 5:32 pm Personally, I just think it looks weird to see characters from Evangelion that... happy . Something must be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jan 02, 2013 5:34 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Personally, I just think it looks weird to see characters from Evangelion that... happy . Something must be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2013 5:49 pm Catamari wrote: Is it just me, or does the object in Asuka's hand look like a vibrator?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jan 02, 2013 8:41 pm Shinji's never had a hair on his face in his life. Even in the Schick universe, he's useless. (Please, grasp that this is a joke.) I wonder if I would cause third impact by telling him that?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jan 02, 2013 9:19 pm Reichu wrote: I wonder which of Schick's marketing geniuses thought that having an Eva market a hair-removal implement made more sense than an adolescent boy.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jan 02, 2013 9:20 pm CJD wrote: The same ones who thought using Gendo as their lead figure was a good idea, presumably.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jan 02, 2013 9:38 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Well, he's the one that would look the most striking without his beard. It wasn't a terrible idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2013 10:13 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Shinji's never had a hair on his face in his life.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Wed Jan 02, 2013 11:00 pm The message I got from this is if you shave teenage girls will be all over you. Seems legit.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Jan 03, 2013 10:59 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Shinji's never had a hair on his face in his life. Even in the Schick universe, he's useless. (Please, grasp that this is a joke.) I wonder if I would cause third impact by telling him that?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Fri Jan 04, 2013 3:00 pm CJD wrote: "Hey guys! Don't you want to be like the morally ambiguous at best, unethical prick at worst, dick of a father who treated all your favorite characters like pawns, and yet lacks the unrealistic dominant personality that makes a similar chessmaster like Light Yagami or Lelouch enjoyable? Then you should use Schick! Because with Schick you too can be an insecure, unlikable douchebag who's so unable to cope with loss that he won't form meaningful relationships and treats valued allies like dirt!"

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Fri Jan 04, 2013 8:56 pm The viewer's eyes are dircted to Kaji, the central figure in the painting, indeed he appears to be addressing the audience as well. Kaji appears androgynous, Adam Kadmon, a primal form. To his left stands a taller, more blatantly masculine figure, Gendo. The other man stand as a counterpart to Kaji, again viewing the viewer, though in a less direct way. However, whereas Kaji stands calm in his happiness, Gedo betrays a bestial insanity, his mouth open in bloodlust, his blade having just swiped like a weapon. Rei stands to Gendo's left. She is in in the throws of embarrassment and pleasure, evidence by her eyes, smile, and blush, the most eroticized of the characters. Her eyes are aimed not at Gendo, who she appears to be servicing, but at Kaji, suggesting a wist for a different lover. To Kaji's right is Asuka. She cradles a phallic device in both her hands. Blushing like Rei, her eyes are aimed not at Kaji or Gendo, but at nowhere in particular, purposely avoiding the strange object that is the true object of her desires. Barely noticable is Mari to Asuka's right. She is not really interacting with the world in any way, as Asuka does with her phallic love, Kaji with his vain treatment of his face, Gendo with his violence, and Rei with her towel; in fact she is alienated by it, aware of her nonexistence, and she gazes at the viewer, even more than Kaji does. Blue is the background, dotted with translucent white octogons, somewhat like the specks of spermlike matter hovering in the foreground. Also there is the rainbow, an almost comical element that serves as a notifier that the piece's apparent joyousness is satrical, portraying how our society uselessly masks the psychosexual desires in each of our deepest souls- blind pleasure, sadistic hatred, vain self-love, defense mechanisms, and ultimately suicidal solipsism.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 06, 2013 8:12 pm ...holy crap. That was impressive, Lavinius.

[]:             Quote Post by Bread » Sun Jan 06, 2013 10:15 pm Kaji shaving !? This directly contradicts canon! Looks like I'm buying Gillette now.
summary:
[]: Is this pic an official advertisement             Quote Post by hwdge » Wed Jan 02, 2013 3:45 pm Found this thing on google, is this a real thing, it looks a bit too absurd to be real. guess that means 01 has facial hair?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jan 02, 2013 3:47 pm I never noticed that Asuka's head is bigger than Kaji's. This means something.

[]: &nb
